name: Lilith
bio:
Succubus Blitz Attacker of the Demon Faction, once famous at demon banquets for her beauty and dancing skills. She tears through enemy lines with agile movements.

Role: Single Target Detonation
Specialty: A mid-backline Blitz-type hero that deals ultra-high damage to targets with negative effects; deals massive detonation damage when defeating a target.

skillSlots.name: Wings of Original Sin
skillSlots.description: Attacks the column containing lowest-HP enemy for 300% total DMG with 50% probability to apply [Infect].

skillSlots.name: Evernight Return
skillSlots.description: Attacks lowest-HP enemy for 420% M.DMG with 100% probability to apply [Infect].

effects.name: Surging Desire
effects.description: [Evernight Return] deals 100% ATK + 15% target's Max HP as M.DMG to all other enemies if it kills the target.

effects.name: Surging Desire
effects.description: Crit Rate and Crit DMG increased by 20% when attacking enemies below 40% HP.

effects.name: Surging Desire
effects.description: [Evernight Return] has 100% probability to apply 1 stack of [Infect] to all enemies when killing an enemy.

effects.name: Surging Desire
effects.description: [Evernight Return] Detonates all [Infect] DMG on target.
